word: H5125 - נוּן - nûwn - noon - Be continued

sections.paragraph:
Original: נוּן

Transliteration: nûn

Phonetic: noon

BDB Definition:

  1. (Niphal) continue, to increase, propagate
  2. (Hiphil) continue, to increase, propagate

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1326

Part(s) of speech: Verb
